other_findings.finding: ILC3 cells co-locate with pre-dermal condensate (pre-Dc) cells in prenatal skin based on spatial transcriptomics correlation analyses
other_findings.source: Main text and Extended Data Fig. 1e,f

other_findings.finding: ILC3 interact with pre-Dc cells through CXCL12-CXCR4 and CXCL12-DPP4 ligand-receptor signals
other_findings.source: Main text, Section: HF mesenchymal differentiation

other_findings.finding: ILC3, NK cells and macrophages have a supportive role in B-cell lymphopoiesis in developing organs
pre-dermal condensate (pre-Dc) cells co-located with dendritic and lymphoid cells based on correlation analyses
other_findings.source: Main text, Section: Single-cell atlas of human prenatal skin

other_findings.finding: Innate immune cells, such as macrophages and innate lymphoid cells (ILCs), were present from early gestation

evidence_quotes.quote: lymphoid tissue inducer and ILC3 cells were also predicted to co-locate and interact with pre-Dc cells through ligand-receptor signals implicated in the regulation of cellular adhesion and migration (CXCL12-CXCR4 and CXCL12-DPP4)
pre-dermal condensate (pre-Dc) cells co-located with dendritic and lymphoid cells based on correlation analyses
Innate immune cells, such as macrophages and innate lymphoid cells (ILCs), were present from early gestation
